dict.string: We use your location to suggest relevant phrases based on your surroundings. For example, suggesting At the park if you're at a park
We use your location to suggest relevant phrases based on your surroundings. For example, suggesting At the park if you're at a park
We use your microphone so you can record speech to generate possible answers for a cargivers questions. For example you are asked what your name is we record it and transcribe.
The App uses the photo library to personalize the conversation for instance a picture of dad or mom or a known relative
We save photos you take so you can use them in your conversations and personalize your experience.Images are private to your device. They are not uploaded anywhere.
We use the camera so you can take photos to personalize people, pets, toys and places.Images are private to your device. They are not uploaded anywhere.
We use your microphone so you can record speech to communicate with others. For example, your speech is transcribed into text and read aloud.
